State Licensing Reference
All States All Specialties How It Works

Pharmacist License
Transfer by State

National License RPh (Registered Pharmacist)
National Exam NAPLEX (North American Pharmacist Licensure Examination) & MPJE
Renewal Cycle 1–2 years

Endorsement States

51

Requires a separate board application with fee and processing time.

How to use this directory

Use the path filter to focus on endorsement or CDR states. Sort by fee or extra steps to find the cleanest route. Open any state for steps, documents, and renewal details.
